svg.title: GridLock 2.0 Round 2 – End-to-End System Architecture
svg.desc: Full pipeline from image input through preprocessing, detection, violation classification, LPR, evidence generation, and analytics dashboard.

g.text: Denoising · CLAHE · motion-blur removal · resize & normalise

svg.text: All sub-models output: violation_type, confidence, bbox

g.text: Multi-label classifier · confidence thresholding · severity tier
Heatmaps · violation trends · CSV/PDF export · searchable records
Precision · Recall · F1 · mAP · FPS benchmarking

svg.text: Label tool: Roboflow · Format: YOLO annotation · Train/val/test split: 70 / 20 / 10
Synthetic night/rain augmentation via imgaug to handle low-visibility edge cases
Leverage Theme 1 parking violations data → feeds Module 3 illegal parking sub-model
Leverage Theme 2 event data → informs Module 7 heatmap context layer
